open_questions_resolved.note: All blocking product questions are answered or assigned.

non_goals_confirmed.note: Non-goals and scope boundaries are documented.

no_critical_security_issues.note: Security review completed with no unresolved critical findings.

no_high_correctness_issues.note: Code review completed with no unresolved high-severity correctness issues.

verification_evidence_attached.note: Verification evidence is attached to the release packet.

human_approval.note: Release approved by the human lead.
